calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-15-2003 Off Calendar

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Oct-02-2002 Vacated

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-08-2002 Case Settled - Set For Crc 525 Hearing On Jan-21-03 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-16-2002 Continued To Oct-08-02 At 03:30 P.M. In Dept 503

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Sep-13-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEAR: Judith C. Wolff, Esq. 510/433-1000 for pltf & opposing party; Michael J. Leon Guerrero, Deputy City Atty 554-4285 & Cecilia T. Mangoba, Deputy City Atty 554-3927 for defts & moving parties EDDIE HENDERSON AND PATRICIA LLOYD.
RULING: Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling (DEFENDANTS' (HENDERSON & LLOYD) MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT/MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION =
GRANT AS TO SEXUAL HARASSMENT AS TO BOTH DEFENDANTS. DEFENDANTS DID NOT ENGAGE IN SEXUALLY HARASSING CONDUCT.
GRANT AS TO DISCRIMINATION. SUPERVISORS CANNOT BE LIABLE FOR PERSONNEL DECISIONS UNDER RENO.
GRANT AS TO INTENTIONAL INFLICTION OF EMOTIONAL DISTRESS. PERSONNEL DECISIONS, EVEN IF MADE WITH AN IMPROPER MOTIVE, ARE NOT OUTRAGEOUS AS A MATTER OF LAW UNDER JANKEN.
DENY AS TO RETALIATION. TRIABLE ISSUE OF FACT WHETHER DEMOTION AND FAILURE TO PROMOTE RETALIATORY). (AJR/PB)

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Sep-13-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEAR: Judith C. Wolff, Esq. 510/433-1000 for pltf & opposing party; Michael J. Leon Guerrero, Deputy City Atty 554-4285 & Cecilia T. Mangoba, Deputy City Atty 554-3927 for defts & moving parties CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO AND SAN FRANCISCO MUNICIPAL RAILWAY.
RULING: Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling (DEFENDANTS' (CCSF & MUNI) MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT/MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION =
GRANT SUMMARY JUDGMENT AS TO MUNI BECAUSE NO SPEARATE LEGAL ENTITY.
GRANT SUMMARY ADJUDICATION ON PUNITIVES AS TO CCSF. See Gov't 818.
DENY AS TO HARASSMENT. TRIABLE ISSUE OF FACT RE CONTINUING VIOLATION DOCTRINE, AND DEFENDANT'S EFFORTS TO REMEDY CONDUCT.
DENY AS TO DISCRIMINATION. TRIABLE ISSUE OF FACT RE LLOYD'S DECISION-MAKING ABILITY AND HER COMMENT DEMONSTRATES DISCRIMINATORY ANIMUS.
DENY AS TO RETALIATION. TRIABLE ISSUE OF FACT WHETHER DEMOTION AND FAILURE TO PROMOTE RETALIATORY.
DENY AS TO INTENTIONAL INFLICTION OF EMOTIONAL DISTRESS. HARASSMENT OUTRAGEOUS CONDUCT). (AJR/PB)

MOTION Notice Of Motion And Motion For Summary Adjudication;Statement Of Undisputed Facts And Suppoting Evidence
